# Dungeon Floor Maps
# Format: Each floor separated by ---FLOOR:n---
# 0=floor(walkable), 1=wall, S=start, E=stairs_down, U=stairs_up
# Size: 20x20
---FLOOR:1---
11111111111111111111
10000000001000000001
10111110101010111101
10100010101010100101
10101110001010100101
10100000001010000101
10111111101011111101
10000000001000000001
11111011111101111111
10000000000000000001
10111110111110111101
10100010000010100101
10100011101010100101
10100000001010100101
10111111101110111101
10000000000000000001
11110111011101111111
10000000000000000001
1S00000000E000000001
11111111111111111111
---FLOOR:2---
11111111111111111111
10000000000000000001
10111101011101111101
10100101010001000101
10101101011101000101
10100001010101000001
10111111010101011101
10000001010101000001
11011101010111011111
10000001010000000001
10111101011101111101
10100101010100000101
10100100010101010101
10100111110101010001
10111000000101010101
10000111110001010101
11110100001111010111
10000100000000010001
1U000100000E00010001
11111111111111111111
